title: Conservation of Energy and Resources
unitGoal: Students will compare energy sources, understand resource use, and practise stewardship-minded choices that conserve energy and materials.

lessons.title: Forms of Energy in Everyday Life
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on light, sound, heat, electrical, mechanical, and chemical energy in everyday examples.

lessons.title: Renewable and Non-Renewable Energy Sources
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on comparing energy sources, benefits, limits, reliability, and stewardship questions.

lessons.title: Electricity, Heat, and Energy Choices
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on electricity use, heat transfer, insulation, and choosing efficient tools and habits.

lessons.title: Conservation at Home and School
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on practical conservation choices without asking students to reveal private home details.

lessons.title: Natural Resources and Stewardship
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on water, forests, minerals, fuels, materials, and responsible care for creation.

lessons.title: Environmental Effects and Trade-Offs
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on comparing choices honestly, noticing benefits and costs, and avoiding oversimplified answers.

lessons.title: Design an Energy-Saving Plan
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on designing a realistic energy-saving plan using evidence and respectful recommendations.

lessons.title: Unit 5 Final Quiz
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned final quiz on energy forms, sources, conservation, natural resources, stewardship, and trade-offs.
